title: Crafted Tweaks
description: A datapack that adds crafting recipes to fill in the holes left in Minecraft's crafting system.
body:
[![Crafted Tweaks Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hovDTgHj/images/5f1f0830957a994c97aacf31a17604909d3ef42e.png)]()

## A datapack that adds optional crafting recipes to fill in the holes left in the Minecraft crafting system.
This datapack is in active development, I will add whatever I feel is an upgrade.

Not 100% sure what all to add, but if you go to the GitHub you can request recipes!
## Features:
### Crafting Recipes
<details>
<summary>Dye Recipes</summary>

- Craft coal/charcoal to black dye.
- Craft glow ink sac to light blue dye.
- Craft gunpowder to light gray dye.
- Craft redstone/sweet berries to red dye.
- Craft slime ball to lime dye.
- Craft yellow & blue dye to green dye.
- Craft purple dye from amethyst crystals.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Replacement Recipes</summary>

- Craft book and quill with glow ink sac

</details>
<details>
<summary>Sculk Recipes</summary>

- Craft sculk catalyst from sculk and bone block.
- Craft sculk sensor from sculk vein and sculk.
- Craft sculk shrieker from bone and sculk.
- Craft sculk vein from sculk.
- Craft sculk  from sculk vein.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Shortcut Recipes</summary>

- Craft minecarts from 5 iron ingots and the block.
- Craft bread, cookies, paper and shulkerboxes in the 2x2 crafting grid.
- Craft calibrated sculk censor from sculk, sculk vein and amethyst shards.
- Craft chests from logs.
- Craft sticks from logs.
- Craft dispenser from bow and dropper.
- Craft dispenser from string, sticks and dropper.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Unpackable Recipes</summary>

- Craft blue ice back into packed ice.
- Craft packed ice back into ice.
- Craft wool back into string.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Woodcutter Recipes</summary>

- Craft plank variants from planks.  
- Craft any variant in the stonecutter to make sticks equal to the amount of blocks that would normally be used in the crafting table.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Miscellaneous Recipes</summary>

- Craft amethyst cluster from amethyst crystal.
- Craft blaze rod from blaze powder.
- Craft bundle from leather/rabbit hide and string.
- Craft cobweb from string.
- Craft music disk 11 from obsidian and coal.
- Craft rooted dirt from dirt and hanging vines.

</details>

## Credits:
[Vanilla Tweaks ](https://vanillatweaks.net) for the inspiration.
